# TrainFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable TrainFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/trainfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://trainfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.trainfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/trainfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/trainfyi-embed
- API: https://trainfyi.com/developers/

## Transport FYI Widget Family

- [AirportFYI Widget](https://widget.airportfyi.com)
- [AirlineFYI Widget](https://widget.airlinefyi.com)
- [PlaneFYI Widget](https://widget.planefyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
